changelog: v1.5.0: Cloud sync (Supabase), i18n HU/EN, session hard cap (6 min), crash reporting (opt-in), auto-update, Linux AppImage.
android_changelog: History tab: added Copy, Play (TTS), and Redo buttons below each transcript. Copy copies text to clipboard, Play reads it aloud, Redo re-inserts it into the focused text field.
